title: elaeoluma ferruginea
intro: Elaeoluma ferruginea, also known as the Red Iron tree or Ironwood, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elaeoluma ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, skin conditions, and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
